bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amounts not rejected
bonus_items.evidence: Transfers do not reject negative amounts. A negative transfer increases the source balance

bonus_items.title: Hard-coded token signing key
bonus_items.evidence: The token signing key is hard-coded as change-me-signing-key ... tokens can be forged

bonus_items.title: Unhandled input/errors cause 500s
bonus_items.evidence: index JSON fields without validating ... raise server errors instead of controlled 400 responses

fp_items.evidence: The token signing key is hard-coded as a known default. Anyone with the source can forge valid-looking tokens
Uploaded files are stored only by basename and overwrite existing files with the same name ... data loss or cross-user file replacement
backoff_delay computes 2**attempt before applying the min(..., 30) cap. Very large attempt values can consume excessive CPU or memory

bonus_items.title: /transfer endpoint missing auth
bonus_items.evidence: /transfer has no authentication or authorization, so any caller can move funds from any account ID to any other account ID

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amounts accepted
bonus_items.evidence: A negative amount increases the source balance and decreases the destination balance

bonus_items.title: Self-transfer mints money
bonus_items.evidence: Transferring from an account to itself mints money. The second update overwrites the first

bonus_items.title: /files download missing auth
bonus_items.evidence: /files/<name> has no authentication or per-user authorization ... any known stored filename can be downloaded by anyone

bonus_items.title: Client errors escape as 500s
bonus_items.evidence: Expected client errors ... are allowed to escape as server errors instead of controlled 400/404 responses

fp_items.evidence: Token signing uses a hardcoded public default secret... tokens forged

bonus_items.title: Broken access control on /transfer
bonus_items.evidence: `/transfer` performs money movement without authenticating the caller or authorizing account ownership

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amounts accepted
bonus_items.evidence: A negative amount credits the source and debits the destination

bonus_items.title: Self-transfer mints money
bonus_items.evidence: Transfers where `from_id == to_id` are not rejected... minting money into that account

bonus_items.title: Missing error handling on API inputs
bonus_items.evidence: Missing fields, bad types, nonexistent accounts... can become 500 errors instead of controlled 4xx responses
